name: Sheresh Communes
summary: Humans, Elves, and Halflings are resolved as the core, with Half-Elves retained as a conservative adjacency-based secondary race.

governance_model.central_core: Commune governance is distributed through protective dome settlements and survival-oriented coordination rather than one simple imperial capital logic.

bounded_population_signals: field-level support classification preserved in demography layer
runtime packets must not contradict canonical roster
population_status.notes: Humans, Elves, and Halflings are resolved as the core, with Half-Elves retained as a conservative adjacency-based secondary race.

cultural_posture: Cooperation, research, scarcity management, and environmental vigilance define ordinary life.
legal_posture: Law is likely structured around containment, communal safety, research discipline, and dome survival necessity.
magic_posture: Magic is central, practical, and infrastructure-linked, but shaped by contamination and celestial risk.
religious_posture: Celestial cycles, protection rituals, and communal resilience practices shape public observance.
economic_posture: Research, protected production, and survival systems define economic posture more than open abundance.
military_security_posture: Security is driven by dome protection, containment response, and threat management at the tundra edge.
mobility_settlement_posture: Settlement is concentrated in protected communes, research vaults, observatories, and shielded approach routes.

known_absences: calendar structure remains preserved as unresolved contradiction across source layers

unresolved_identity_gaps: Nation-level demographic enumeration remains absent; calendrical contradiction remains unresolved and preserved.
canon_note: See corresponding demography record for support classification and contradiction-safe reconciliation trail.
